screenshot.areaUnavailable: Area capture is available on macOS.

update.errorTitle: Update check failed. Click to retry.

sourceSelector.windowsNote: Only visible (non-minimized) windows can be recorded.

permissions.screenRecordingNeeded: CalcFocus needs Screen Recording permission before you start. System Settings has been opened. After enabling it, quit and reopen CalcFocus.
permissions.screenRecordingMissing: Screen Recording permission is still missing. System Settings has been opened again. Enable it, then quit and reopen CalcFocus before recording.
permissions.accessibilityNeeded: CalcFocus also needs Accessibility permission for cursor tracking. System Settings has been opened. After enabling it, quit and reopen CalcFocus.
permissions.accessibilityMissing: Accessibility permission is still missing. System Settings has been opened again. Enable it, then quit and reopen CalcFocus before recording.
permissions.selectSource: Please select a source to record
permissions.systemAudioUnavailable: System audio is not available for this source. Recording will continue without system audio.
permissions.microphoneDenied: Microphone access was denied. Recording will continue without microphone audio.
